sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18730" key="a)/xlusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄχλυσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n18730.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dimming, clouding,</tr_> Syn.Alch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.58B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
